basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Legal Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Jr. Grade of Mizoram Legal Service (Legal Officer)
basic_details.short_information: The Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC) has released the official notification for the recruitment of Jr. Grade of Mizoram Legal Service (Legal Officer) posts. This recruitment drive aims to fill 2 vacancies for eligible law professionals seeking a government legal service opportunity in Mizoram. Candidates having a Bachelor’s Degree in Law from a Bar Council of India recognized university and at least 3 years of active practice as an Advocate are eligible to apply.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Upper age limit relaxable up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Law from a University recognized by Bar Council of India, Actively practicing as Advocate for not less than 3 years
qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree in Law from a University recognized by Bar Council of India. Actively practicing as an Advocate in Courts of Civil and Criminal jurisdiction for a period not less than three (3) years.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Jr. Grade of Mizoram Legal Service (Legal Officer)

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Jr. Grade of Mizoram Legal Service (Legal Officer)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Mizoram PSC Jr. Grade of Mizoram Legal Service (Legal Officer) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Mizoram PSC Jr. Grade of Mizoram Legal Service (Legal Officer) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Mizoram PSC Jr. Grade of Mizoram Legal Service (Legal Officer) Vacancy Details 2026

rows.post_name: Jr. Grade of Mizoram Legal Service (Legal Officer)

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Bachelor's Degree in Law from a University recognized by Bar Council of India. Actively practicing as an Advocate in Courts of Civil and Criminal jurisdiction for a period not less than three (3) years.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Upper age limit relaxable up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates.

content_sections.heading: Mizoram PSC Jr. Grade of Mizoram Legal Service (Legal Officer) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Mizoram PSC Jr. Grade of Mizoram Legal Service (Legal Officer) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC Jr. Grade of Mizoram Legal Service (Legal Officer) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 24th August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Jr. Grade of Mizoram Legal Service (Legal Officer) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Law from a University recognized by the Bar Council of India and have at least 3 years of active practice as an Advocate.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Jr. Grade of Mizoram Legal Service (Legal Officer) post?
faq.answer: The age limit is between 21 years and 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for ST/SC candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be placed at Level - 10 in the Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official Mizoram PSC website before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned for the PwBD category. Please refer to the official notification for details on other categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Jr. Grade of Mizoram Legal Service (Legal Officer) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Direct Recruitment Examination.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is available in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Mizoram PSC?
faq.answer: The official website of Mizoram PSC is https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in.
